review_text: Lovely park, very friendly staff. Will go back again
Very tidy park,good clean facilities friendly staff

Stunning.  Nicest caravan park we have stayed at
Gardens are beautiful and private sites . Very clean neat and tidy . Indoor pool . Quiet .
A great park in a lovely little town. I hope the park never changes
Great park will be back

We booked a unpowered campsite last minute and absolutely loved it. The bathrooms were clean and well cared for and the staff were lovely and accommodating. Very conveniently located for quick access to the beach and Port Fairy. Would highly recommend this park.
Second stay. Great location. Clean and tidy. Big flat electrical sites and cabins. Onside pool and kids playground.  Kitchen and other facilities clean and well maintained.
Great Park to stay in.

Now this is a hidden gem, beautiful gardens it's like staying in someone's well maintained yard. Sites are generous staff are friendly and the amenities are spotless. Make sure you stay if in Port Fairy.
Apart from struggle get people answer phone the caravan park is amazing

We really liked this caravan park. The staff are very friendly and the grounds well maintained. They have a heated pool and a hidden area at the back of the park with a giant playground for the kids a tennis court and a great camp kitchen.

Port Fairy Holiday Park is run by Big4.
We are long-standing members of Big4, and enjoy their parks all over Australia.
This Park is every bit up to the expected Big4 standards.
We booked a Cabin, it was clean and comfortable - Thank you.
The Park is on the outskirts of Port Fairy, a few minutes' drive to the town.
There was no vehicle or truck noise from the main road.
Yes, well recommended!
Really nice little caravan park.  The deluxe cabin we stayed in was well laid out and very large for a cabin with big bathroom.
Great site at a beautiful location
The bathroom sink is clean.

This property boasts exceptionally well-maintained grounds, featuring amenities such as a jumping pillow, children's playground, a heated indoor swimming pool with mini water-slide and tennis and basketball courts.  A spacious camp kitchen is equipped with ample cooking facilities, including a full-sized freestanding oven, and offers ample shelter from inclement weather, complete with a large television for entertainment.  Modern, large bathrooms are also available.
Whilst being close to town and a variety of shops, this place is still quiet and relaxing.
The property exceeds expectations in terms of amenities and is highly recommended.

The amenities at the Port Fairy Holiday Park were great, especially the indoor heated pool. However it was the service that the staff provided that really was exceptional. Thanks for being so helpful, and thanks for a lovely stay in Port Fairy.

Love this little gem of a caravan park.
We had a Powered site , level , grassed and sheltered.
Has a swimming pool, games room & outdoor games area .
Now with glamping pods & ensuites to sites. Best of all they have added two toilets on outer of ensuites for anyone to use . Fabulous idea .
Has a little road noise.
Cows in the paddock for those that love them.
Serviced really well.
Highly recommended.
We stayed in an ensuite powered site. Wonderful caravan park site, grass covered and clean. Clean ensuite. Very spacious. Plenty of facilities for the kids.
Very nice 👌
Gorgeous stay in a safari tent with my family. Extremely clean and wonderful facilities.

Very protected (from winds) site.
Well-appointed park, like a heated pool.
Amenities very clean.
Awesome holiday park! Loved the pool and the facilities.
Only stayed for a night but found the park to be spotless and the member of staff extremely helpful.
Good place for 1  day stay. The swimming pool is so clean and well maintained. Good facilities for car parking and near to all beautiful spots. Cottages are good.
Brought caravan for a week. Well maintained park. Beautiful location between Moyne River and Eastern beach. Walking distance to town. Highly recommend.
Holiday park with all amenities.. indoor swimming pool... Indoor recreation area... Caravan park...
Wifi was decent, nice facilities, indoor pool, nice staff.
Great location, friendly, and helpful staff. I have stayed here four times now and will be back.
Good little park on the outskirts of town, 20 mins to walk into the town. Clean amenities, spacious sites nicely kept. Heated indoor pool.

What a gem. A must stay if in Port Fairy. Clise to everyhing. Its a beautiful town. The park is small, very clean and so much for kids to do and also quiet for adults. As all kids equipment is at the back. Very nice heated pool. Holly at front desk was so helpful. But the gardens are so lovely no one is on top of each other and we all have extra space. Camp kitchen perfect.

We had a lovely time at the park definitely going back there the pool was very clean and the slide was fun for the kids. Water was warm and kids spent two days in and out the pool when the weather turned. Great location, clean amenities.
Nice and clean, good sites
We recently stayed at this caravan park, very happy with our stay, friendly staff, amenities immaculate and grounds well maintained. Well done to all staff.
Wasn't a bad park , would stay there again
Excellent, lovely welcome on arrival, good range of sites, sunny or shade, great camp kitchen and spotless amenities. Quiet and highly recommended.

Great small park.  Tidy and clean.  Nice space out back for kids away from main road. 2klms walk into town. Take your own drinking water as water tastes terrible in Port Fairy.  Missing a pizza oven and something at weekends such as movie night or pancakes in morning
Lovely spot for camping spacious location was great spot not to far from town, you can walk it!👌🏼

Fabulous stay! Cabin was beautiful and well equipped. Honestly had everything!

The site is gorgeous and the amenities are perfect.

The location is fantastic especially for the great ocean road as it is a nice town to stay over.

Definitely recommend

We have just stayed 3 nights here in our caravan. This is one of the best camps we've stayed at so far, clean amenities,  private and quiet sites, friendly staff and only about 1.5km to town. Would highly recommend.

Good place to stay, it's not suuuper close to the beach or shops when walking (except the bp which has food and drinks) but it's a short drive or bike ride to anywhere in town.

The only dramas we had was that the hot water in my cabin was a little bit dicky and would switch to cold at inopportune moments while showering, and at 10pm one night the aircon headunit above my bed started dripping water on my pillow so had to switch it to fan only mode but these were relatively minor issues.

Staff were nice and friendly, pancake brekky on Weds morning was a hit and there's a playground with jumping pillow that was pretty cool, and a giant chessboard. The pool was good and pretty clean and has a small waterslide, and a separate toddler pool.

1br standard cabin was well priced for a summer peak budget accomodation option and with the bunks in the main room it's good for the family despite being 1 bedroom.
Sehr freundlich und verständnisvoll!

Absolutely loved our family holiday here. Very friendly staff, fantastic facilities and always something happening for the kids to do.
Will definitely be back.
Thanks for having us!
Excellent customer service.  Lovely clean Park and Amenities.  Highly recommend 👌
Great Holiday Park .Friendly Atmosphere & Top Facilities
The cleanest and most well cared for park so far. Lovely amenities. Very quiet. Helpful staff. 10/10 from me.

Stayed in our mid-sized motorhome overnight; a big-rig could be catered for, just warn them. The grounds are beautifully kept, the shower and toilet facilities are excellent, the amenities in the camp kitchen are first class, and there are plenty of activities for kids. Powered, unpowered, and tent sites are plentiful. Dog friendly, except in the cabins, it now boasts a DIY dog wash. Quiet, too.

Stayed in a cabin, clean and well equipped, unfortunately the TV didn't have any HD stations only SD stations. Bring DVDs as they have a DVD player in the room. The pool was great, clean, and warm but not too warm. Port Fairy is a township, so only a short drive to beaches, shops, and other amenities. Usual have free kids movie of an evening in the lighthouse room.

We stopped here for an overnight stay after a long day of driving. The lady at reception ( I wish I got her name) was extremely helpful giving us a drive through site so we could stay hooked up and made us feel very welcome. It was a beautiful park, fantastic amenities and I would have been happy to have stayed much longer.
Port Fairy is gorgeous.  Park was good, location very convenient, easy walk yo shops and town. Only disappointment was in such a huge park, that was mostly empty,  we were all pushed together.

Fabulous park. Clean and neat.
Would highly recommend.

My family and I stayed here over the kings birthday long weekend in one of the wonderful safari tents. The service we got was too notch and the safari tent was next level. Great for the kids and big kids at heart. The tent had everything you need, comfortable beds for everyone, a kitchen with all you need, a fully functioning bathroom, tv, heating - the works! Outside on the great deck was a Webber for all your cooking needs and a fantastic bath overlooking the beautiful camp grounds and neighboring cows! The park facilities were just as great. Kids playground, jumping pillow, basketball/tennis court and indoor heated swimming pool. We had the best time and can’t wait to visit again in the warm month. A winter getaway to add to your list!
Site okey
